text:
A squirrel loves nuts.

One autumn afternoon.

A big storm.

That night.

There was nothing.

But morning stars.

A sapling?

Leafy?

Yes.


Somehow?

Just nuts.


So?

Just nuts?

Just love.

You think?

Stars?

That?

So love.

So nut.












I think…

That?

Nothing eats love.



I think…

That’s beautiful.

You think?

Or weird.


Just nuts.









That's me.





Think?

Thinking.

That’s love.





So…

Why?

Weird thoughts.

Why love nuts?

Why love?

Just thoughts.





Ah.

Some.

Anyway?

Every day.
















.







That?

Why?

Nothing.

Just love.













That?

Nothing.






































I love?

You.


Just nuts.

















That?
















So?

Nothing?

Nothing love.







That?

Well.
.











.


















Nothing.







I think?








Such.



Any.


Just nuts.





















That’s love.





























.







Any thing.







Why
